# [network-request] Sovrn Commerce

**Network name:** Sovrn Commerce (formerly VigLink)

**Slug:** `sovrn`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://meridian.sovrn.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://knowledge.sovrn.com/

**Account requirements:** Active Sovrn Commerce publisher account with site
verification complete. API access is granted on request.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** Direct successor to VigLink and a
common fallback for content-monetisation publishers. Overlaps significantly
with Skimlinks in role; many publishers run both to compare commission
rates per merchant.
